title: Stacker Search Request
description: Request body for searching records in a Stacker object

search.description: Full-text search string applied across search_fields

search_fields.description: Field API names to search within

include_fields.description: Field API names to include in the response

count.description: Maximum number of records to return

order_by.description: Field API name to sort results by

target.description: Field API name to filter on

operation.description: Comparison operator (eq, neq, contains, gt, lt)
